title: carlemannia griffithii
intro: Carlemannia griffithii, also known as Carlemannia, is a flowering plant species in the family Apocynaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Carlemannia include the ability to treat fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as acting as an expectorant to aid in the removal of mucus from the lungs. Carlemannia can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions.
